title: prunus padus var. seoulensis
intro: Prunus padus var. seoulensis, also known as the Korean bird cherry or bird cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The herbal preparations of Prunus padus var. seoulensis include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, often used to make teas, syrups, and salves for topical application.
